untranslatable_reason: This signal requires detection of order flow microstructure patterns (consecutive same-side trades from specific counterparties, participant identity tracking, and behavioral prediction). The available indicators do not include participant order flow data, trade-by-trade sequencing, counterparty identification, or behavioral momentum metrics. Vol_ratio_20 and returns are proxies only and cannot accurately capture the core pattern of repeated directional trading by a specific participant within a 15-trade window.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally based on order book microstructure and counterparty behavior analysis (Jon's tendency to buy after buying/selling after selling). This requires real-time order flow data, participant tracking, and intra-bar trade sequence analysis—none of which are available in the standard OHLCV indicator set provided. The rule cannot be accurately translated into price-action conditions. A proper implementation would require custom order flow analysis at the tick/trade level.
